family_summary: War between the Government of Ethiopia and allied Eritrean/Amhara forces against the TPLF/TDF, with major spillover into Amhara and Afar. Direct, indirect, and mixed-mortality estimates vary sharply by source and phase.
notes: Episode-first bundle. Core DR uses direct violent deaths only and fully estimates only episode tigray_e1_2020-11_2021-06.
